title: Hello Tring to get all columns of another board which has column type file

posts.author: nitesh (Nitesh Singh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello All,

I am trying to do some automation on Monday board in that while i select destination board on recipe at that time i want all column of destination board as a list in the recipe which has column type file

So any Suggestion to get all columns of another board which has column type file on recipe after selection destination or other board?.

posts.author: FrancisElliott (Francis Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @nitesh

This sounds like an interesting use case. For more complex automations like this, you might try setting something up with API. With that, you can query boards and columns and create much more specialized workflows.

Here’s a start: Boards

If you need some more help, please feel free to reach out or put a meeting on my calendar.
